nodes.name: main.jsx
nodes.summary: React application entry point that mounts the App component into the #root DOM element using React 19's createRoot, wrapped in StrictMode, and loads the global stylesheet.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses the modern react-dom/client createRoot API (React 18+) rather than the legacy ReactDOM.render.

nodes.name: vite.config.js
nodes.summary: Vite build configuration for the React starter app, registering the official @vitejs/plugin-react plugin to enable JSX transformation and Fast Refresh.

nodes.name: dog.webp
nodes.summary: Shared WebP image asset of a dog, used as a sample picture by the HTML and CSS course exercises in this learning repository.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Minimal project README containing only the GitHub repository URL (https://github.com/chrusterd/hancom), with no further documentation.
